title: Implement probationary congress verdict for reinstated personas

log.message: Created from Congress #14 verdict on: How should we bring personalities that are on severance (inactive/fired) back into the active roster

Source verdict: Reinstatement requires a demonstrated gap — not nostalgia, not a slow news cycle, but a concrete debate where Spengler's specific lens would have changed the outcome and no active persona could fill i...
Policy is documented in CLAUDE.md but no workflow-level probationary enforcement was implemented in congress_wf.py or serve.py. Stale — needs explicit implementation work.
